properties.name: getPropagatedRowSelectionModel
properties.description:
Returns the modified selection model after applying row selection propagation.

Use this to achieve proper `rowSelectionPropagation` behavior when setting the selection model using `setRowSelectionModel`.
properties.type: (inputSelectionModel: { type: 'exclude' | 'include', ids: Set<GridRowId> }) => { type: 'exclude' | 'include', ids: Set<GridRowId> }

properties.name: selectRowRange
properties.description: Change the selection state of all the selectable rows in a range.
properties.type: (range: { startId: number | string, endId: number | string }, isSelected?: boolean, resetSelection?: boolean) => void

properties.name: selectRows
properties.description: Change the selection state of multiple rows.
properties.type: (ids: GridRowId[], isSelected?: boolean, resetSelection?: boolean) => void
